ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANT SCOTT CO. OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO VACATE AND/OR CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE AND SEVER THIS CASE FROM BRAYTON GROUP 366

ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-09-2006 IN 206, DEFENDANT SCOTT CO. MOTION TO VACATE AND/OR CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE AND SEVER THIS CASE FROM BRAYTON GROUP 366 WAS GRAMTED. THE CASE IS SEVERED FROM BRAYTON GROUP 366 AND ADDED TO BRAYTON GROUP 379. THE TRIAL DATE OF 8/28/06 IS CONTINUED TO 12/18/06 AT 11:15 AM IN DEPT. 206, AND THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE DATE OF 8/18/06 IS CONTINUED TO 12/8/06 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 304. DISCOVERY CONSISTENT WITH NEW TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE ROBERT L. DONDERO; CLERKS: VERA MU/LESPY; REPORTER: ARLENE RITA HOWELL CSR #2542 (206)
